hotspots.label: Textile Dye Discharge
hotspots.description: High Red/Blue spectral ratio indicating textile dye effluent. Consistent pattern over 3 months.

hotspots.label: Tannery Waste Plume
hotspots.description: Extremely high turbidity (NDTI=0.91) with organic signatures. Chromium-contaminated waste suspected.

hotspots.label: Mixed Industrial Runoff
hotspots.description: Moderate pollution with textile dye indicators. Multiple potential sources in cluster.

hotspots.label: Thermal Discharge
hotspots.description: Significant thermal anomaly (+10°C above baseline). Power plant cooling water discharge suspected.

hotspots.label: Dyeing Unit Discharge
hotspots.description: Vivid spectral signature of synthetic dyes. Active discharge visible in latest imagery.

hotspots.label: Industrial Waste Zone
hotspots.description: Tannery waste signatures detected. Located near Narayanganj industrial belt.

hotspots.label: Garment Factory Cluster
hotspots.description: Garment washing and dyeing units discharge detected via high R/B ratio.

hotspots.label: Critical Dye Pollution
hotspots.description: Highest severity hotspot. Extreme dye concentration turning river visibly colored.

hotspots.label: Leather Processing Zone
hotspots.description: Post-relocation tannery waste still entering via drainage channels.

hotspots.label: Mild Thermal Anomaly
hotspots.description: Moderate thermal discharge. Possibly cooling water from industrial facility.
